title: UHC AssistX
description: The best pack for Uhc pvp! 15 Features in this resource pack. All for uhc pvp.
body:
# Video For You Subscribe My Channel!

# UHC AssistX
Again The Best Resource Pack For UHC Pvp!

UHC AssistX is a clean PvP resource pack designed for competitive UHC players. It improves visibility, reduces screen clutter, and gives you a smooth combat experience.
# Features✨
- Low Shield (Cleanest Shield Ever✨)
- Low Fire
- Small Cobweb
- Better Golden Apple
- Short Sharped Sword (Specialy Design For UHC Pvp Player)
- Visible Bow Charging
- Small Bow
- Golden Apple Bug Fixed
- Small Axe
- Visible Charged Crossbow
- Small Pickaxe
- Small Golden Apple
- Shield Bug Fixed
- Smooth & Lightweight Performance!

I've used a lot of resource packs to create this resource pack!
Example: Transparent Inventorys (GUI & HUD) By xSpinHDx

> Perfect for: Uhc, Sword, Axe.

## Dominate every fight with UHC AssistX.

This Pack Only Recommended For UHC, Sowrd, Axe Pvp.
